metadata.reference: V. Schnabel, R. Spolenak, M. Döbeli, H. Galinski. Structural color sensors with thermal memory: Measuring functional properties of Ti-based nitrides by eye. Adv. Opt. Mater. 6, 1800656 (2018)
metadata.comments: Reactive magnetron sputtering; Ar/N<sub>2</sub> gas mixture of 10/1; negative bias potential: 100 V; substrate temperature: 400°C
